P95 latency spikes to 2.3s at 50 VUs.","fixSuggestion":"Increase pool size to 25-50 or implement connection queuing. Consider using PgBouncer for connection pooling."},{"severity":"medium","title":"API response missing pagination metadata","description":"List endpoints do not include `total`, `page`, or `hasNext` fields, breaking client-side pagination.","fixSuggestion":"Return `{ data: [...], meta: { total, page, perPage, hasNext } }` from all list endpoints."},{"severity":"medium","title":"Form validation runs only client-side","description":"Email and phone number validation is only enforced in the UI, server accepts malformed data.","fixSuggestion":"Add Zod/Joi validation schema to API route POST handlers to mirror client-side constraints."},{"severity":"low","title":"Missing rate limiting on public endpoints","description":"The /api/search endpoint has no rate limiting, allowing potential abuse.","fixSuggestion":"Add express-rate-limit or similar middleware with a reasonable 100 req/min per IP limit."}]}

issues.title: Authentication flow missing CSRF protection
issues.description: The login endpoint does not validate CSRF tokens, making it vulnerable to cross-site request forgery attacks.
issues.fixSuggestion: Add `csrf-tokens` middleware or include X-CSRF-Token header validation in your auth handler.

issues.title: Memory leak in WebSocket connection handler
issues.description: Event listeners are not removed when connections close, causing gradual memory growth under load.
issues.fixSuggestion: Call `socket.removeAllListeners()` in the `close` event handler or use `{ once: true }` for one-time handlers.

issues.title: Database connection pool exhausted under 50+ concurrent users
issues.description: Load tests reveal connection pool (size=10) becomes bottleneck. P95 latency spikes to 2.3s at 50 VUs.
issues.fixSuggestion: Increase pool size to 25-50 or implement connection queuing. Consider using PgBouncer for connection pooling.

issues.title: API response missing pagination metadata
issues.description: List endpoints do not include `total`, `page`, or `hasNext` fields, breaking client-side pagination.
issues.fixSuggestion: Return `{ data: [...], meta: { total, page, perPage, hasNext } }` from all list endpoints.

issues.title: Form validation runs only client-side
issues.description: Email and phone number validation is only enforced in the UI, server accepts malformed data.
issues.fixSuggestion: Add Zod/Joi validation schema to API route POST handlers to mirror client-side constraints.

issues.title: Missing rate limiting on public endpoints
issues.description: The /api/search endpoint has no rate limiting, allowing potential abuse.
issues.fixSuggestion: Add express-rate-limit or similar middleware with a reasonable 100 req/min per IP limit.
